raw.message: 本格ポーカーが楽しめるアプリで中毒者続出

hook.summary: High-energy intro featuring anime characters on cards and a logo reveal.
hook.visual_action: Anime character cards frame the top and bottom while a poker chip spins in the center to reveal the game logo.
hook.text_overlay: 勝ち上がれ 究極のマインドスポーツ！ 好評配信中
hook.voiceover_transcript: 勝ち上がれ、究極のマインドスポーツ！エムホールデム！

scene_flow: High-energy intro with character cards and logo reveal.
Messaging about accessibility for both beginners and pros over character art.
Showcase of free-to-play Texas Hold'em and online multiplayer features with gameplay footage.
Closing splash screen with the full cast and game title.
on_screen_text: 勝ち上がれ 究極のマインドスポーツ！
初心者も本格派も楽しめる
テキサスホールデムが無料で遊べる！
全国のプレイヤーとオンライン対戦可能！
audience_proxy: Japanese gamers who enjoy anime-themed competitive card games and Texas Hold'em.
